name: Fayez Spa
message: Fayez Spa - the company provides services of spa-therapists and stylists, anti-aging and relaxing procedures including spa kuhnya, in addition, conducts anti-aging treatment including anti-aging injections. Fayez Spa corporate office is located in 2224 Wharncliffe Rd S, London, Ontario, N6P 1L1, Canada and has 24 employees.
